name: Lentil Loaf (Am)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked AM Lentils (red or green)
1 cup Cooked AM Medium Brown Rice
1 cup AM Garbanzo Flour (mixed with 2/3 cup Cold water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cooked lentils and grains.
2. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Spoon into a loaf pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 45 minutes.
5. Drizzle gravy or catsup over top.
